suspicious_activity.narrative: Patrick Williams (CUST_0118) exhibited unusual activity in August 2025, with multiple high-value cash deposits and ATM withdrawals at different branches (e.g., $7,212.80 at Branch_Eastside_Center on 2025-08-03, $7,762.48 at Branch_Downtown_Main on 2025-08-02). Despite no previous suspicious patterns, this sudden change in behavior warrants further investigation.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: No clear indication of financial crime. The customer has multiple accounts with high balances and transaction amounts, but no suspicious patterns or activities are observed. The transactions are diverse and seem to align with regular personal and business expenses. However, the closed business account needs further investigation.
